content: I'm a Data Science master's candidate at Middle Tennessee State University (4.00 GPA) who builds AI systems across the full lifecycle — data engineering, model training and fine-tuning, and production deployment.

My focus is Generative AI and applied machine learning: retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, LLM fine-tuning, and deep-learning models for computer vision and scientific signal detection. I've shipped this work through internships at NeuralForge AI and SlashMark and a graduate assistantship at MTSU.
I'm also a published researcher (IEEE Xplore), with work spanning visible-light indoor positioning and IoT-based health monitoring.

highlights.title: Generative AI & RAG
highlights.description: LangChain, vector databases and LLM fine-tuning for document intelligence and internal Q&A.

highlights.title: Deep Learning & CV
highlights.description: CNN and Transformer models for medical imaging, gravitational-wave detection and multi-camera tracking.

highlights.title: MLOps & Data Engineering
highlights.description: AWS, Docker, MLflow and REST APIs; pipelines and BI dashboards in Power BI and Tableau.

highlights.title: Published Researcher
highlights.description: IEEE Xplore — visible-light positioning and IoT health-monitoring systems.
